articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: South Korea's Kospi hits fresh high as Asian markets brush off Trump's latest tariff moves - CNBC
articles.description: Asia markets rose Monday amid tariff uncertainty as U.S. President Donald Trump announced over the weekend that he would increase global tariffs to 15%.
articles.content:
Asia-Pacific markets rose Monday amid tariff uncertainty as U.S. President Donald Trump announced over the weekend that he would increase global tariffs to 15% from 10%.
